Name: EASTMAN 12V Drill Driver Kit All in One Power Set 2 Batteries 28Nm Torque 24 Piece Accessory Dual Speed Screwdriver Home DIY
Description: COMPLETE 24-PIECE DIY SOLUTION: Solve the problem of missing tools and scattered bits. This comprehensive kit includes 9 Sockets (5-13mm), 6 Screw Bits, 6 Drill Bits (Wood & Steel), and a Connecting Rod, all organized in a sturdy BMC Case, so you have everything you need for furniture assembly and home repairs in one box. DOUBLE THE RUNTIME (2 BATTERIES): Never let a dead battery stop your project halfway. Unlike standard kits, this package comes with Two 12V 1.5Ah Lithium-Ion Batteries, allowing you to swap and keep working continuously while the other charges in just 1 hour. REACH IMPOSSIBLE ANGLES: Stop struggling with tight corners and awkward spaces. The kit features a specialized Extension Soft Rod (Flexible Shaft) that bends and twists, allowing you to drive screws in cabinets, drawers, and computer cases where rigid drills cannot fit. DUAL SPEED PRECISION CONTROL: Prevent stripped screws and damaged surfaces. The Variable Speed Gearbox offers two ranges: 0-400 R
